name: Bo-Kaap
description: Colorful houses and cobblestone streets in the heart of Cape Town. Rich in Malay culture and history. Don't forget to try the koeksisters!

name: Gold Reef City
description: Theme park and museum built around an old gold mine. Experience Joburg's mining history, ride the Anaconda rollercoaster, and try your luck panning for gold!

name: Blyde River Canyon
description: One of the largest canyons in the world. Stunning views, hiking trails, God's Window viewpoint, and the Three Rondavels. Pure Mpumalanga magic!

name: Muizenberg Beach
description: Famous for colorful beach huts and gentle waves. Perfect for surfing lessons and sunset walks. The vibe is immaculate!

name: Walter Sisulu Botanical Garden
description: Beautiful gardens with a waterfall, hiking trails, and Verreaux's eagles nesting on the cliffs. Perfect picnic spot in Joburg!

name: Stellenbosch Wine Farms
description: Historic wine estates with mountain views. Do a wine tasting, eat at a fancy restaurant, or just enjoy the scenery.

name: Drakensberg Amphitheatre
description: Majestic mountain range with hiking trails, San rock art, and the Tugela Falls - the world's second-highest waterfall!

name: Victoria Yards
description: Urban creative hub in Joburg. Artists studios, urban gardens, restaurants, and a Saturday market. Very vibey!

name: Clarens Village
description: Charming Free State town surrounded by mountains. Art galleries, breweries, and adventure activities. The perfect weekend getaway!

name: uShaka Marine World
description: World-class aquarium and water park in Durban. See sharks, ride slides, or chill at the beach right next door!
